## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and align on brand positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [17% decrease in organic traffic last week, likely due to Easter holiday](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Need for better reporting on lead quality and traffic from updated content](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Webstacks uses a modular, component-based approach for efficient website redesigns](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate Webstacks' unique process and positioning into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [17% decrease in organic traffic last week, mostly affecting design-related pages](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Overall traffic has been flat since February](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Lead growth down in recent months, but MQLs (sales form submissions) have increased](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Need for better visibility into lead quality and traffic from updated content](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Content Updates

  - [Working on new content agreed upon earlier in the week](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Updating existing content with new conversion panels, SEO titles](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [17 assignments under website redesign cluster available for next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Devon to provide another pillar and guidelines for keyword research next week](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

### Webstacks Process Overview

  - [Web strategists involved from sales process through project completion](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Comprehensive website audit categorizes work and page types](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Modular, component-based approach allows for parallel work streams](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Design discovery process educates clients on atomic design principles](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Development starts with individual components before full page builds](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [Process subtly educates clients on composability for websites](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)

### Client Challenges

  - [Clients often come with issues from previous agencies or freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [Common problems include inability to make updates, lack of design systems](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Webstacks' approach addresses these issues through education and flexible implementation](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)

### Marketing and Development Collaboration

  - [Traditional agency processes create bottlenecks and inflexibility](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2772.0)
  - [Webstacks' composable approach allows for greater agility and faster iterations](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [Importance of bridging the gap between marketing and development teams](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Devon to send example Gong calls showcasing different phases of the process](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=3155.0)
  - [Consider having Nikon (developer) join next week's call for technical perspective](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=3202.0)
  - [Devon to provide another content pillar and keyword research guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate Webstacks' unique process into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Explore potential for thought leadership content on LinkedIn and other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/-7W_7RhcKKddm5ABmaYEkLtB4xncZNz9?tab=summary&timestamp=2903.0)
